meaning: 努瓦克肖特[毛里塔尼亚首都]
examples: Nouakchott accounts for 89% of all the cases.
Nouakchott is the capital and the largest city.
Mauritania: 497 cases including 10 deaths (CFR 2%) have been reported in Nouakchott from 20 July to 10 August.
Last year, SOS opened a school for escaped slaves and their children in Nouakchott.
Plastic makes up a quarter of 56, 000 tonnes of waste produced annually in Nouakchott, official statistics show.
